message:
fix: mission explorer import losing steps due to stale closure (#3446)

When importing a mission from the explorer card view (not detail view),
handleScanComplete read pendingImport from a stale React state closure.
The async fetchMissionContent updated the state with steps, but the
scan callback still had the old index-only mission (steps: []).

Fix: use a ref (pendingImportRef) alongside the state so
handleScanComplete always reads the latest resolved mission.

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
